skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music for short videos (5-120 seconds).
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: All 534 static detections are false positives. The skill is a legitimate API client for the Pexo video creation service. Shell script patterns (349 external command detections) are standard bash scripting for API calls, not code injection. Network access is limited to Pexo's own API endpoints. Credential access is standard API key authentication. Filesystem access is limited to config files and temp directories for caching.

medium_findings.title: Shell Script Execution with External Dependencies
medium_findings.description: The skill executes 9 bash scripts that make HTTP requests to the Pexo API. Scripts perform file uploads, project management, and video asset retrieval. All operations are to a single trusted API endpoint.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Shell scripts make legitimate API calls to pexo.ai. No user input injection into commands. Standard curl/HTTP patterns used throughout.

low_findings.title: Config File Access in Home Directory
low_findings.description: Skill reads API configuration from ~/.pexo/config file. This is standard practice for API client credentials storage.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Config file access is expected for API authentication. No sensitive data exfiltration detected.

low_findings.title: Temp Directory Creation and File Caching
low_findings.description: Scripts create ~/.pexo/tmp directory for caching downloaded video assets. Uses standard mktemp pattern for secure temp file handling.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Temp file creation is standard for HTTP downloads. No user input in file paths. Uses mktemp for secure creation.

content.user_title: Create professional short videos with AI
content.value_statement: Professionals and content creators who need polished short videos (5-120s) lack the time or skills for video production. Pexo Agent automates scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music selection by connecting to a professional video creation API.
actual_capabilities: Create short videos (5-120 seconds) in 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1 aspect ratios
Upload user images, videos, or audio files and incorporate them into generated content
Handle multi-turn conversations with the AI to refine videos based on user feedback
Present multiple preview options and allow users to choose their preferred version
Produce product advertisements, brand videos, explainer content, and social media clips
Automate scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music selection
limitations: Cannot crawl web URLs for assets; files must be uploaded or downloaded locally first
Video generation takes 15-20+ minutes depending on complexity
Output length is capped at 120 seconds maximum
Requires a Pexo API key and credits for the video creation service

use_cases.title: Product Marketing Teams
use_cases.description: Quickly generate promotional videos for new products or services without needing video editing skills or equipment.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams, e-commerce sellers, brand managers

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creators
use_cases.description: Efficiently produce batches of short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.
use_cases.target_user: Influencers, content creators, social media managers

use_cases.title: Explainer and Tutorial Producers
use_cases.description: Create professional explainer videos and tutorials to communicate complex ideas visually.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Video Request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a short promotional video about our new product launch next week.

prompt_templates.title: Video with Reference Assets
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a product video using the image I uploaded. Make it energetic and suitable for Instagram.

prompt_templates.title: Detailed Brand Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a 60-second brand video featuring our company logo, using warm colors and upbeat music.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - Specific style and technical requirements

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Part Campaign
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a series of 3 videos: a 15s teaser for TikTok, a 30s standard version, and a 60s long-form for YouTube. All using the same product images.
prompt_templates.scenario: Expert - Multiple outputs with consistent branding

output_examples.input: I want a product video for my new sneakers
output_examples.output: Video created successfully. Your video is ready at: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/projects/xxx/assets/video.mp4. View project: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_xxx

output_examples.input: Create an explainer video about our mobile app
output_examples.output: Pexo is creating your video. This takes 15-20 minutes. Track progress at: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_yyy

best_practices: Upload reference images, logos, or brand assets before requesting videos to ensure brand consistency
Keep initial requests focused; let Pexo ask clarifying questions rather than over-specifying the output
Use the same project ID when requesting revisions to maintain creative context across iterations
anti_patterns: Do not add creative instructions about shots, transitions, or timing - Pexo handles these professionally
Avoid uploading files via web URLs; always download locally and upload through the skill first
Do not use bare asset IDs without proper XML tags (<original-image>, <original-video>, etc.)

faq.question: What file formats are supported for upload?
faq.answer: Images (jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic), videos (mp4, mov, avi), and audio (mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac) are supported.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: A 15-second video typically takes 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos may take additional time.

faq.question: Can I use web image URLs directly?
faq.answer: No. Pexo cannot crawl web URLs. Download the file locally first, then upload it using the skill.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are available?
faq.answer: Videos can be created in 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (portrait), or 1:1 (square) formats.

faq.question: How do I request revisions to a video?
faq.answer: Use the same project_id and send your feedback through pexo-chat. Pexo maintains context across the conversation.

faq.question: What if my credits run out?
faq.answer: The skill will detect credit errors and guide you to purchase credits at pexo.ai/home. After adding credits, retry your request.
